channel.title: +Articles on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Articles on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Bosnian war and USA
item.description: Thread by @NebojsaMalic on Thread Reader App. Did you know that the Bosnian War (1992-1995, 98k dead) didn’t have to happen? There was an EU-brokered deal all three communities agreed to. But the US ambassador went to the Bosnian Muslim leader and said he can renege on it. Which he promptly did. A short 🧵. Then he unilaterally declared independence and claimed Serbs and Croats living in Bosnia were “aggressors” for opposing him.
